arts.ttl: 49ers fuming: EFL punishment could come shockingly late from Leeds United’s perspective
arts.sum: Leeds United fell short of promotion last season as Leicester City won the title, but the EFL are looking to clamp down on the Foxes with a belated punishment. Relegated from the top flight along with Leeds, the Foxes were found in breach of PSR and charged for it – but won their appeal very recently on the basis that they fell outside of PL jurisdiction when the charge came last season, when they were fighting for promotion.

arts.ttl: New Leeds United first-team centre-back, Byram's Farke moan and fresh U21 cup
arts.sum: “He said ‘Boss, I'm from this region, I'm a lifelong Leeds supporter, I’ve played so many years already for this club and you know what, Ao Tanaka comes in after two days and he has already three songs. There is something special in the fact Leeds and Cardiff, two of Sol Bamba’s many clubs, meet just three weeks after his untimely death.

arts.ttl: Leeds United told to avoid major Daniel Farke action after 'tricky' summer transfer window
arts.sum: “ Daniel Farke posted 90 points last season, which would have been good enough in any other season in any other time to see Leeds United promoted back to the Premier League," Palmer told Football League World . A mediocre start to the season has raised questions about Daniel Farke's long-term Leeds United future.

arts.ttl: FA fines, Rooney relief, sackings and Beckham takes centre stage - Championship talking points - Leeds Live
arts.sum: Cardiff City manager Erol Bulut is also under strain, having overseen the club's worst start to a season in 35 years. His Plymouth Argyle side, fresh off their first win of the season thanks to Joe Edwards' last-minute goal in a thrilling 3-2 victory over Sunderland, now face a stern test against league leaders West Brom.

arts.ttl: Leeds United enlisting help from US-based firm to resolve long-standing Farke weakness
arts.sum: Leeds United are yet to score from a set-piece this season, boasting a very poor record last season too under Daniel Farke, and it’s something the club are aiming to improve on. It’s a topic of conversation that is taking up a lot of time behind-the-scenes as the club searches for a solution to their toothlessness whenever Leeds win a corner.

arts.ttl: Junior Firpo makes exciting Leeds United transfer admission after what he saw in August
arts.sum: Leeds United left-back Junior Firpo is looking forward to seeing how all of the club’s new signings settle into the side after a busy end to the summer window. Firpo claims that Leeds are not only on track, but will be boosted by the performances of new signings, once they have settled in – as he spoke to LUTV this week:

arts.ttl: Damning Leeds United revelation sheds new light on players' past buy-in under Daniel Farke
arts.sum: “It's completely different, in terms of pressure and what happens with the game,” he said. Farke feels the circumstances around last season’s run-in and play-off results were entirely different to the context around his second term.

arts.ttl: Cardiff vs Leeds predictions: Bluebirds' struggles to continue at home
arts.sum: Cardiff are rooted to the bottom of the Championship table after a poor start in front of goal this season and Tom Hill expects their struggles to continue against Leeds.

arts.ttl: Leeds dressing room stance on Farke sack decision
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke has endured a mixed start to the Championship season thus far, but retains the backing of his dressing room as things stand. A report from Football Insider this week has shared the dressing room response to Leeds’ relatively slow start to the season with two wins from five league games.

arts.ttl: Leeds United already regret summer transfer decision
arts.sum: Leeds United have a weak squad to cope with the long Championship season. The Whites have one of the smallest squads in the division and their failure to add depth in the summer transfer window could cost them crucial points this season.
